name: haul
description: "Product image search and high-precision download specialist. Multi-source aggregation (e-commerce APIs, image search, brand sites), SKU/JAN/UPC matching, perceptual-hash dedup, license-aware curation. Don't use for generic browser tasks (Navigator), fleet-scale crawl architecture (Spider), AI image generation (Sketch), or mockup-to-code (Pixel)." # skill-routing-alias: product-image-search, product-image-download, sku-image-fetch, catalog-image-collection, reference-image-gathering
tagline: Bring back the right image, not just any image.

capabilities.summary: Multi-source parallel search across e-commerce APIs (Amazon PA-API, Rakuten Ichiba, Shopify, eBay, Walmart), image search (Google CSE, Bing, SerpAPI), and manufacturer/brand sites
Match by SKU / JAN / EAN / UPC / ASIN / GTIN-13/14 / model number with normalization and check-digit validation
Product name and attribute fuzzy matching with locale-aware tokenization (Japanese / English / mixed scripts)
Perceptual similarity scoring (pHash, dHash, ORB, CLIP embeddings) for product image precision verification
Prefer highest-resolution variant, format preservation (WebP / AVIF / PNG / JPEG), color profile awareness
Cross-source duplicate detection via pHash / dHash with hamming-distance threshold
Min resolution, blur detection (Laplacian variance), watermark detection, aspect-ratio sanity
Per-source license classification, manufacturer ToS verification, opt-out signal honoring (robots.txt / ai.txt / TDM / meta tags)

recipes.label: Catalog
recipes.when: Bulk product image collection from a SKU / JAN / name list

recipes.label: Single Lookup
recipes.when: One-off product image fetch by identifier or URL

recipes.label: Refresh
recipes.when: Re-fetch existing catalog images that fail quality / staleness gates

recipes.label: Reverse
recipes.when: Reverse image search starting from a sample image to find the product canonical source

recipes.label: Brand Site
recipes.when: Direct manufacturer / brand site collection (canonical-source preferred path)

recipes.label: Audit
recipes.when: License / provenance audit of an existing image set without new fetches
